Total RNA was extracted using Qiagen mini kit. Quality control and measurement were performed using NanoDrop and Agilent Bioanalyser.
Biotinylated cRNA were prepared using Ambion Totalprep RNA Amplification kit for Illumina arrays
Data was processed by means of  Genome Studio v2010 from illumina, Inc. The background noise was substrated and quantile normalization was applied.
